page_content:
GENERAL BUSINESS MINOR

NOTICE OF ADDENDUM: Program description was updated effective Spring 2026 and has been published on ADDENDA TO THIS CATALOG (https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/addenda/ #General_Business).

Associate Dean: Joseph Bailey, Ph.D. Assistant Dean: Brian Horick

The General Business minor provides the business savvy to complement the depth of knowledge acquired in the students' chosen area of major, so they excel in their careers after graduation. Note: The General Business minor is not open to declared Business majors.

For more information about this minor visit http://rhsmith.umd.edu/ programs/undergraduate/academics/academic-minors/.
